context: Tests whether the solver applies the swift-language skill's modern Swift idioms to a small helper while preserving behavior and avoiding unrelated domains.

checklist.name: Typed throws
checklist.description: Uses or explicitly recommends typed throws for the single clear ValidationError domain.

checklist.name: Guard preconditions
checklist.description: Uses guard-style early exits for title validation preconditions.

checklist.name: Switch expression
checklist.description: Rewrites the priority icon selection without a mutable temporary variable, using a switch expression or equivalent direct return.

checklist.name: Collection count
checklist.description: Counts matching tags with count(where:) or its trailing-closure form instead of a manual loop.

checklist.name: Behavior preserved
checklist.description: Preserves the original validation order and keeps trimming after validation.

checklist.name: Compatibility note
checklist.description: Mentions Swift version compatibility for typed throws or other modern syntax when relevant.

checklist.name: Scope control
checklist.description: Does not expand into SwiftUI, concurrency, architecture, lint configuration, or full package scaffolding.
